supersedes.reason: Prior plan embedded STAT async-duel implementation details in architecture_reference and used a 17-token palette that included light-mode surfaces. Scope is re-aligned to FINALIZED_ARCHITECT_PLAN.json v2.0: MMOS HTML Manual Engine only, 9 locked dark tokens only, 20 MR-1377 archetypes only.

ui_lock.token_lock_rule: Any hex value outside design_tokens_locked fails the build. No white backgrounds. No light surfaces.

architecture_reference.system_goal: Render a single self-contained dark-UI HTML operator manual from ENGINEERING_PLAN.json, with per-step run buttons, RESULT header parsing, per-phase gating, global and per-phase progress bars, auto-advance within phase, confirm-to-advance between phases, MMOS_STATE localStorage persistence, and a manual-override toggle.
architecture_reference.pipeline_position: Stage 2 of ChatGPT -> Claude -> Codex -> Claude. Input is ARCHITECT_PLAN.json (or FINALIZED_ARCHITECT_PLAN.json for meta runs). Output is this ENGINEERING_PLAN which Claude Manual Builder reads directly to emit FULL_OPERATOR_MANUAL.html plus MANUAL_AUDIT.json sidecar.

result_header_contract.json_stage_format:
Line 1: RESULT: COMPLETE|PARTIAL|FAILED
Line 2: SUMMARY: <one sentence>
Line 3: blank
Line 4+: payload
result_header_contract.html_stage_format:
First bytes: <!-- RESULT: COMPLETE|PARTIAL|FAILED
SUMMARY: <one sentence>
SOURCE_HASH: <sha256>
-->
<!DOCTYPE html>...
result_header_contract.unified_rule: One RESULT header convention across all stages. Parser runs json regex first; on miss, runs html-comment regex; on miss, returns MISSING_RESULT_HEADER.

files.purpose: Operator execution surface. Renders header, sidebar, tab-content panels, phase-loc, section-header, card, step-header, step-control, prompt-block, gate-box, conf-box, next-box, verdict-box, status-panel, hl, hl-a, hl-g, hl-w, st, badge. No external assets.
files.top_of_file_header:
<!-- RESULT: COMPLETE
SUMMARY: <one sentence>
SOURCE_HASH: <sha256 of ENGINEERING_PLAN.json>
BUILT_FROM: A3_MMOS_ENGINEERING_PLAN_v1
-->

files.purpose: Dark palette token definitions on :root and class styles for the 20 MR-1377 archetypes.
files.token_forbidden: Any hex not in design_tokens_locked. Any named color (white, black, red, etc). Any rgb()/hsl() not resolving to a locked token.
global_rules: html, body { background: var(--mm-navy); color: var(--mm-text); }
body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.65; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
No CDN @import. No external font. No external URL of any kind.

files.purpose: Hydration, render loop, run-step controller, RESULT parser, gate controller, auto-advance controller, progress system, manual override, MMOS_STATE persistence, audit computation, deep-link router.
The ENGINEERING_PLAN.json consumed by the manual engine. Embedded so the HTML is self-contained and hash-verifiable.
files.size_constraint: Must be the exact same bytes used to compute SOURCE_HASH in the top-of-file header.

files.purpose: Produced by Claude Manual Builder alongside the HTML. Not rendered inside the manual UI. Records component counts, token presence, banned-token counts, deprecated-name counts, and step counts.

forbidden_files: any url starting with http:// or https:// referenced from the HTML

responsibilities: Read embedded ENGINEERING_PLAN JSON from <script id=engineering-plan>.
Call engine.validatePlanSchema; abort if invalid.
Compute SOURCE_HASH locally; compare to html_comment_result_header SOURCE_HASH; log mismatch to audit.
Hydrate MMOS_STATE from localStorage; fallback to engine.defaultState on miss or schema mismatch.
Call render.shell then render.allTabs.
Bind delegated event handlers for run buttons, gate buttons, override toggle, result paste textareas, tab clicks, hash change.
test_assertions: With a valid plan: initial render paints the header, sidebar, every phase tab, every step card, and the global progress bar.
With a missing <script id=engineering-plan>: abort with PLAN_SCHEMA_INVALID banner and disable run buttons.
With a stored MMOS_STATE whose schema_version does not equal 2: wipe the namespaced key, re-init from defaults, log SCHEMA_VERSION_MISMATCH to audit.

responsibilities: Assert presence of top-level keys: project_bucket, thread_name, artifact_role, artifact_version, source_architect_plan, ui_lock, architecture_reference, file_structure, function_map, ui_components, orchestration_logic, state_management, error_handling.
Assert ui_lock.design_tokens_locked has all 9 tokens.
Assert ui_lock.structural_archetype_list length equals 20.
Return ok=true only when every assertion passes.
test_assertions: Remove design_tokens_locked['--mm-accent'] -> ok is false, errors contains 'missing token --mm-accent'.
Set structural_archetype_list length to 19 -> ok is false, errors contains 'archetype count 19 expected 20'.
All checks pass -> ok is true, errors is empty.

responsibilities: Emit the initial MMOS_STATE skeleton: project_id, schema_version=2, phase_progress[] seeded from plan phases, step_progress[] seeded from plan steps with status=PENDING, manual_override_enabled=false, refinement_cycle_count=0, last_active_tab='tab-overview', manual_override_audit=[].
test_assertions: Length of phase_progress equals number of phases in plan.
Length of step_progress equals sum of steps across all phases.
All step_progress[].status values equal 'PENDING'.

responsibilities: Read localStorage[MMOS_STATE::{project_id}].
Parse JSON; on parse error, fall back to engine.defaultState and log.
On schema_version mismatch, wipe and re-init.
On project_id mismatch, ignore and re-init under the correct namespaced key.
Reconcile step_progress against current plan: drop orphan step_ids, seed missing step_ids with PENDING.
test_assertions: Valid persisted state with matching project_id and schema_version -> statuses restored exactly.
Stored schema_version=1 and current=2 -> fresh default state returned; audit log includes SCHEMA_VERSION_MISMATCH.
Plan adds a new step_id not in storage -> new step_id present in returned state with status=PENDING.

responsibilities: Serialize state to JSON.
Write to localStorage[MMOS_STATE::{project_id}].
On QuotaExceededError: trim oldest result_payload strings to length 2000, retry once; on second failure, switch to in-memory Map and raise hl-w banner.
test_assertions: State round-trips byte-for-byte through state.persist then state.hydrate when storage is healthy.
Simulated QuotaExceededError triggers one retry, then hl-w banner text 'Local storage is full. Progress will be kept for this session only until you clear space.' appears.
In the in-memory fallback, state mutations persist across re-renders within the session.

responsibilities: Render header (div.mm-header with logo slot, title from plan.ui_manual.title, badge from plan.project_bucket, manual-override toggle).
Render sidebar (nav.mm-sidebar) with groups Start, Execute, Reference per manual_generation_schema.navigation.
Render global progress bar at top of main.
Insert empty containers for each tab-content panel (one per phase plus reference tabs).
test_assertions: Header contains exactly one element with class 'mm-header' and exactly one child with class 'mm-override-toggle'.
Sidebar contains exactly three group labels: Start, Execute, Reference.
Global progress bar node has role='progressbar' and aria-valuenow attribute.

responsibilities: For each tab in navigation.sidebar_groups: call the matching render function (render.tabOverview, render.tabStartHere, render.tabPhase(phase_id), render.tabFailureCheatSheet, render.tabProgressTracker).
Apply mmos_state.last_active_tab to mark the active tab.
test_assertions: Total rendered tab-content panels equals 2 (Start group) + N (phases) + 2 (Reference group).
Only one tab-content panel carries the 'active' class at any time.

responsibilities: Render phase-loc with pulsing dot and inline phase progress bar.
Render section-header with phase title and one-sentence intent.
For each step in phase: render step-header + step-control + prompt-block (if exact_prompt present) + conf-box (when step.status == PARTIAL or FAILED) + next-box (on intra-phase advance hints).
Render gate-box at end of phase with checklist from phase_gate.checklist and Mark Gate Passed control.
test_assertions: Phase with N steps renders N step-header nodes and exactly one gate-box.
Step with null exact_prompt renders zero prompt-block nodes within its card.
Step with status in {PARTIAL,FAILED} renders exactly one conf-box sibling.

responsibilities: Dispatch to the renderer for one of the 20 archetypes: header, sidebar, tab-content, phase-loc, section-header, card, step-header, step-control, prompt-block, gate-box, conf-box, next-box, verdict-box, status-panel, hl, hl-a, hl-g, hl-w, st, badge.
Each renderer uses only tokens listed for its archetype in manual_generation_schema.mr1377_components.
Reject any archetype name not in the locked 20-archetype list.
test_assertions: Calling render.archetype('not-a-real-archetype', ...) throws ARCHETYPE_UNKNOWN.
Every emitted archetype root element carries a class prefix 'mm-' derived from the archetype name.
No emitted style attribute contains a hex value outside design_tokens_locked.

responsibilities: Compute completed = count(step_progress where status in {COMPLETE, OVERRIDDEN_COMPLETE}).
Compute total = length(step_progress).
Update fill width to (completed / total * 100)%.
Update label to 'Overall: {completed}/{total} steps ({percent}%)'.
test_assertions: 0 of 10 complete -> fill width 0%, label 'Overall: 0/10 steps (0%)'.
5 of 10 complete -> fill width 50%, label 'Overall: 5/10 steps (50%)'.
10 of 10 complete -> fill width 100%, label 'Overall: 10/10 steps (100%)'.

responsibilities: Compute per-phase completed_steps / total_steps.
Update the inline bar inside the phase-loc of that phase.
Update label 'Phase {N}: {completed}/{total}'.
test_assertions: Phase with 3 of 5 complete -> inline bar 60% fill.
Phase completing its last step flips status to COMPLETE and triggers auto_advance evaluation.
Non-active phases also update their phase-loc labels on state change.

responsibilities: Check preconditions: previous step status is COMPLETE or OVERRIDDEN_COMPLETE, OR manual_override_enabled is true.
If step.exact_prompt is present: navigator.clipboard.writeText(exact_prompt); render toast 'Prompt copied. Paste into {ai} thread.'
Reveal the result_paste_panel for this step.
Set step.status = RUNNING; persist state; re-render progress.
test_assertions: Disabled run button on a step whose predecessor is PENDING unless manual_override is on.
Clicking run with exact_prompt=null skips clipboard write and still reveals the paste panel.
State transitions from PENDING to RUNNING and the status badge re-renders.

responsibilities: Trim pasted_text; run parser.resultHeader.
On COMPLETE: set step.status=COMPLETE, step.completed_at_iso=now, step.result_payload=truncate(pasted_text, 4000). If auto_advance.within_phase, focus next step's run button.
On PARTIAL: set status=PARTIAL, surface conf-box with summary and operator prompt 'Resolve the gap before advancing.'; halt phase.
On FAILED: set status=FAILED, surface remediation hint from plan; halt phase.
On no match: render hl-w warning 'Missing RESULT header. Ask the AI to re-emit the response starting with RESULT: COMPLETE / PARTIAL / FAILED.'; status stays RUNNING.
test_assertions:
Pasting 'RESULT: COMPLETE
SUMMARY: done

payload' sets status to COMPLETE and triggers auto_advance.

Pasting 'RESULT: PARTIAL
SUMMARY: gap

payload' halts auto_advance and renders a conf-box.
Pasting plain text with no RESULT header keeps status as RUNNING and shows the hl-w warning.

responsibilities: Run json-stage regex first: ^RESULT:\s+(COMPLETE|PARTIAL|FAILED)\s*\nSUMMARY:\s+(.+?)\s*\n
On miss, run html-comment regex: ^<!--\s*RESULT:\s+(COMPLETE|PARTIAL|FAILED)\s*\nSUMMARY:\s+(.+?)\s*\n
On miss, return {status:'MISSING', summary:null}.
Trim captured summary to 240 characters.
test_assertions:
json-stage input 'RESULT: COMPLETE
SUMMARY: ok

{...}' returns status='COMPLETE', summary='ok'.

html-stage input '<!-- RESULT: COMPLETE
SUMMARY: rendered
SOURCE_HASH: ...
-->
<!DOCTYPE html>...' returns status='COMPLETE', summary='rendered'.
Input 'No header here' returns {status:'MISSING', summary:null}.

responsibilities: Verify every success_criterion checkbox in the gate-box is checked OR manual_override_enabled is true.
Set phase.status = COMPLETE; persist.
Render the canonical commit line in a prompt-block: 'git commit -m "MMOS-CHECKPOINT: Phase {phase_index} {ROLE} complete"'.
If this is not the final phase, open controller.openBetweenPhaseModal.
test_assertions: Gate-box with one unchecked box and manual_override off keeps phase status in progress.
All boxes checked flips phase to COMPLETE and reveals the commit-line prompt-block.
On final phase completion, no between-phase modal is opened.

responsibilities: Render modal with title 'Advance to Phase {N+1}?' body 'Phase {N} is complete. Phase {N+1} begins. Confirm to advance.' confirm_label 'Advance' cancel_label 'Stay on Phase {N}'.
On confirm: set active_tab to the next phase's tab id, scroll to its phase-loc, focus its first step's run button.
On cancel: close the modal; no state change.
test_assertions: Modal is keyboard-dismissible via Escape.
Confirming advances active_tab and calls state.persist.
Cancelling leaves active_tab unchanged.

responsibilities: Set mmos_state.manual_override_enabled to desired_boolean; persist.
If on: enable all run buttons regardless of predecessor status; enable Mark Gate Passed regardless of checklist; render hl-w banner 'Manual override is on. Auto-gating is suspended.'
If off: restore default gating per parser.resultHeader and auto_advance.
Append an entry to manual_override_audit[] with timestamp_iso, action ('enable'|'disable'), and active_step_id (nullable).
test_assertions: Enabling override unblocks a run button that was disabled due to PENDING predecessor.
Each toggle appends one entry to manual_override_audit[].
Disabling override restores predecessor-based disabling and hides the banner.

responsibilities: Look up step.exact_prompt.
Call navigator.clipboard.writeText(exact_prompt).
Render toast 'Prompt copied.' for 2000ms then fade.
On clipboard API error, select the prompt-block text programmatically and render fallback hint 'Press Cmd/Ctrl+C to copy.'
test_assertions: With a working clipboard API, navigator.clipboard.writeText is called with the exact prompt bytes.
With a failing clipboard API, the prompt-block text is selected and the fallback toast appears.
Toast disappears after 2000ms.

responsibilities: On hashchange or tab click, identify target tab_id (strip leading '#').
Deactivate all tab buttons and tab-content nodes; activate the match.
Set mmos_state.last_active_tab = tab_id; persist.
Scroll to top of tab-content.
test_assertions: Navigating to '#tab-ph2' activates the Phase 2 tab-content and matching sidebar button.
Invalid hash falls back to the overview tab and does not throw.
last_active_tab persists across reload.

responsibilities: Count occurrences of each archetype class name (.mm-header, .mm-sidebar, etc).
Verify every token in design_tokens_locked appears at least once.
Scan for forbidden hex values (any hex not in the locked palette); count tokens_forbidden_found.
Count U+2014 and U+2013 occurrences.
Scan for deprecated names listed in NAMING_CANON.md (Admin HQ, MCC, Pipeline, AI Dashboard, MMVS, Instructor Panel, Command Center); count occurrences.
Compute total_steps_rendered and total_steps_expected; equal -> PASS else PARTIAL.
Emit MANUAL_AUDIT.json.
test_assertions: Rendered HTML with one U+2014 character -> audit.em_dash_count == 1 and build_result_status == 'PARTIAL'.
Rendered HTML with all 9 locked tokens present -> tokens_present has 9 entries.
Rendered HTML containing 'MCC' as plain text -> deprecated_names_found contains 'MCC'.

behavior: Sticky at top; height 68px.
Renders manual-override toggle at right edge with label 'Manual Override'.
Toggle click calls controller.toggleManualOverride.
Renders Start, Execute, Reference group labels with horizontal dividers.
Each tab button renders its tab-num pill and label; active tab carries left 3px accent marker and bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04).
Tab click dispatches router.tab(tab_id).
Only one tab-content panel carries the .active class at any time.
Hidden panels use display:none (not visibility:hidden) so tab order stays clean.
Activation triggers a 300ms fadeIn keyframe.
Shows 'YOU ARE HERE: Phase {index} - {title}'.
Pulsing dot animates opacity 1 -> 0.4 -> 1 over 1.5s.
Inline phase progress bar (120px wide, 4px tall) reflects completed/total.
h1 font-size 26px, weight 700, color --mm-text.
intro max-width 700px, color --mm-text-2, font-size 15px.
Background --mm-navy-sec, 1px solid --mm-border, border-radius 12px, padding 28px.
Used as a general content surface in Overview, Start Here, and Reference tabs.
Left side: step number pill + title.
Right side: AI badge (codex=teal tint, claude_opus=indigo tint, claude_sonnet=indigo tint, operator=neutral border) + status pill from mm.badge.
Border-bottom 1px solid --mm-border; border-radius top 12px.
Top row: 2-column grid of tiles: What You Do (left), Expected Output (right).
Middle row: prompt-block (if exact_prompt not null).
Bottom row: primary button 'Run Step' (disabled per preconditions) + status pill.
Reveal result_paste_panel (textarea with placeholder 'Paste full AI response here') on run.
Background #0A1A2E (deeper navy, derived token, NOT a palette addition; declared in :root as var(--mm-navy-deep)).
Label pill bg --mm-accent at top-left corner.
Copy button at top-right; click -> controller.copyPrompt; on success, briefly swap label to 'COPIED'.
white-space: pre-wrap; font-family monospace; body_text rendered byte-for-byte with no HTML entity decoding applied twice.
Label pill 'Gate: Phase {N} to Phase {N+1}' in --mm-accent.
RESULT contract lines 'RESULT: COMPLETE -> proceed' (green) and 'RESULT != COMPLETE -> DO NOT PROCEED' (red) rendered in monospace.
Checklist with checkboxes bound to step success_criteria.
'Mark Gate Passed' button calls controller.markGatePassed.
On pass, reveal prompt-block containing the commit_command.
Dashed 1px --mm-border, rounded 8px, padding 12px 16px.
Renders summary from parsed RESULT, plus an operator_prompt call to action.
Border-left 3px --mm-accent.
Small uppercase 'NEXT' label in --mm-success.
Main text in --mm-text.
Background --mm-navy-sec, padding 32px, radius 12px.
h2 in --mm-accent, font-size 20px.
body text in --mm-text-2.
Background linear-gradient(135deg, var(--mm-navy) 0%, var(--mm-navy-sec) 100%).
Title in --mm-accent, uppercase, letter-spacing 1.2px, font-size 11px.
Rows as 2-column flex: label in --mm-text-2 min-width 140px, value in --mm-text weight 600.
Neutral highlight callout. Border-left 3px --mm-text-2, background rgba(255,255,255,0.03).
Accent highlight callout. Border-left 3px --mm-accent, background rgba(178,58,58,0.08).
Success highlight callout. Border-left 3px --mm-success, background rgba(110,231,183,0.06).
Warning highlight callout. Border-left 3px --mm-warn, background rgba(249,168,37,0.08).
When used as the manual-override banner, sticks to top of .content area.
Table with th background --mm-navy-sec, th text --mm-text.
td border-bottom 1px solid --mm-border, td text --mm-text-2.
Even-row tint rgba(255,255,255,0.015).
PENDING: bg rgba(255,255,255,0.08) text --mm-text-2.
RUNNING: bg --mm-accent text --mm-text.
COMPLETE: bg #1F4D2A text --mm-success.
FAILED: bg #4A1F1F text --mm-fail.
PARTIAL: bg #4A3A1F text --mm-warn.
AI badges use tinted variants of navy/accent with appropriate contrast.

preconditions: previous step status in {COMPLETE, OVERRIDDEN_COMPLETE} OR mmos_state.manual_override_enabled is true
on_run: if exact_prompt present, copy to clipboard via controller.copyPrompt and show toast
on_cancel_or_navigation: RUNNING status persists until a result is submitted or an explicit Reset Step action is taken

result_parsing.on_complete: step.status=COMPLETE; if auto_advance.within_phase scroll_and_focus_next_step; re-render progress
result_parsing.on_partial: step.status=PARTIAL; halt phase; surface conf-box with summary and operator prompt
result_parsing.on_failed: step.status=FAILED; halt phase; surface remediation hint drawn from plan.error_handling.manual_engine_errors
result_parsing.on_missing: render hl-w warning; step.status remains RUNNING; no state transition

auto_advance.between_phase_modal_body: Phase {N} is complete. Phase {N+1} begins. Confirm to advance.

side_effects_on_pass: render commit_command in a prompt-block immediately below the gate-box
if not the final phase, open between-phase modal

enabled_side_effects: all run buttons enabled regardless of predecessor status
all Mark Gate Passed buttons enabled regardless of checklist
persistent hl-w banner at top of .content area: 'Manual override is on. Auto-gating is suspended.'
append audit entry on every state mutation: {timestamp_iso, action, active_step_id}
disabled_side_effects: default gating per result_parsing and auto_advance restored

initialization_rules: On first load for a project_id: seed step_progress[] with PENDING for every step, phase_progress[] with status=PENDING.
On load with existing persisted state: reconcile against current plan. Orphan step_ids dropped. Missing step_ids added with PENDING.
On schema_version mismatch: namespaced wipe, re-init from defaults, log SCHEMA_VERSION_MISMATCH to audit.
On plan_schema invalid: preserve existing state, set global blocking error, disable all run buttons.

progress_tracking_rules.global_formula: count(step_progress where status in {COMPLETE, OVERRIDDEN_COMPLETE}) / length(step_progress)

cross_tab_sync.behavior: On storage event whose key matches this project's namespace, re-hydrate and re-render all tabs.

architecture_error_tokens.user_facing_message: Engineering plan is invalid. Controls are disabled. Re-emit a valid ENGINEERING_PLAN.json.

architecture_error_tokens.detection: render.archetype called with a name not in the 20-archetype list
architecture_error_tokens.user_facing_message: Internal render error. Refresh the page.

architecture_error_tokens.detection: audit.compute found a hex value outside design_tokens_locked
architecture_error_tokens.user_facing_message: Build audit failed: token lock violation. Review MANUAL_AUDIT.json.

manual_engine_errors.detection: parser.resultHeader returned status='MISSING' on a run submission
manual_engine_errors.user_facing_message: Missing RESULT header. Ask the AI to re-emit the response starting with RESULT: COMPLETE / PARTIAL / FAILED.
Step failed. Review the AI summary and re-run, or open a refinement cycle.
Step is partial. Resolve the gap before advancing.
State schema updated. Resetting your local progress for this project.
Local storage is full. Progress will be kept for this session only until you clear space.
Refinement cap reached. Operator review required before another cycle.

manual_engine_errors.detection: audit.compute found a deprecated name (Admin HQ, MCC, Pipeline, AI Dashboard, MMVS, Instructor Panel, Command Center)
manual_engine_errors.user_facing_message: A deprecated name was found in the rendered manual. See MANUAL_AUDIT.json.
Em-dash or en-dash found in rendered manual. Auto-replace with ' - ' and re-render.
Press Cmd/Ctrl+C to copy the prompt.

on_blocking_error: disable all Mark Gate Passed buttons
surface error token at top of .content area in an hl-a callout
on_non_blocking_error: surface per-error render target (hl-w, conf-box, etc) next to the failing control
do not mutate state beyond the specific step that failed
on_audit_downgrade: top-of-file HTML comment result header is set to RESULT: PARTIAL

execution_manifest.phases_placeholder: Populated at render-time from plan.architect_output_schema.phases. Each phase produces one tab-content panel with its ordered steps.
execution_manifest.total_steps_source: sum of length(plan.phases[i].steps) for i in 0..N
execution_manifest.gate_order_source: plan.phases[] order; one gate-box at end of each phase tab-content

completion_definition.manual_partial_when: any audit downgrade condition is met
completion_definition.manual_failed_when: any PLAN_SCHEMA_INVALID or ARCHETYPE_UNKNOWN is active at build time

deterministic_build_contract.stable_id_rules: Every DOM id of form 'tab-{phase_id}', 'step-{step_id}', 'gate-{phase_id}'. Ids are sha256(project_id + index)[:8] from the architect plan.
deterministic_build_contract.array_ordering_rules: Phases sorted by phase_index asc; steps within a phase sorted by step_index asc; function_map sorted by function_id asc.
deterministic_build_contract.timestamp_policy: No timestamps inside rendered HTML body. The only timestamp may appear in the top-of-file HTML comment (generated_on from metadata). mmos_state.last_hydrated_at_iso lives only in localStorage.

unresolved_items_explicit.description: header.logo_slot is an optional inline SVG placeholder. The v2.0 architect plan does not specify a logo path. The renderer defaults to an empty <span class=mm-logo-slot/> and does not fetch any external asset.
unresolved_items_explicit.resolution_path: If a logo is required, the operator supplies an inline SVG via plan.ui_manual.logo_svg; else the slot remains empty.

unresolved_items_explicit.description: prompt-block uses a derived token --mm-navy-deep (#0A1A2E) that is not in the locked 9-token palette but is required to visually distinguish code surfaces from --mm-navy and --mm-navy-sec.
unresolved_items_explicit.resolution_path: Declare --mm-navy-deep in :root as a derived token and list it in MANUAL_AUDIT.json.tokens_present as a derived token. Any other hex remains forbidden.

unresolved_items_explicit.description: commit_command_template uses a {ROLE} token (e.g., ARCHITECT, CODEX, MANUAL_BUILDER). The role is not always derivable from phase metadata alone.
unresolved_items_explicit.resolution_path: phase_gate.commit_message from the architect plan carries the fully-resolved commit string. The engineering plan treats it as opaque and renders it verbatim.

integration_with_claude_manual_builder.input_required_at_build_time: This file (A3_MMOS_ENGINEERING_PLAN_v1.json) plus the corresponding ARCHITECT_PLAN.json that it references.
integration_with_claude_manual_builder.build_entry_point: Claude Manual Builder reads this engineering plan, then emits FULL_OPERATOR_MANUAL.html (with engineering plan embedded as <script type=application/json id=engineering-plan>) and MANUAL_AUDIT.json sidecar.
integration_with_claude_manual_builder.result_header_at_build_time:
Manual Builder emits HTML whose first bytes are <!-- RESULT: COMPLETE|PARTIAL|FAILED
SUMMARY: ...
SOURCE_HASH: <sha256 of this engineering plan>
BUILT_FROM: A3_MMOS_ENGINEERING_PLAN_v1
-->
claude_must_not: add ui_components not in the locked 20 archetypes
add hex values not in design_tokens_locked (the single allowed derivation is --mm-navy-deep)
emit U+2014 or U+2013 anywhere in the HTML
reference deprecated names (Admin HQ, MCC, Pipeline, AI Dashboard, MMVS, Instructor Panel, Command Center)
introduce new function_ids not in function_map
claude_must: bind every function_id to an actual JavaScript function in the embedded <script>
render one tab-content panel per architect phase plus Overview, Start Here, Failure Cheat Sheet, Progress Tracker
bind every run button to controller.runStep
bind every Mark Gate Passed button to controller.markGatePassed

fail_conditions_declared: architecture altered: any deviation from FINALIZED_ARCHITECT_PLAN.json v2.0
novel UI archetype introduced: any class not in the 20-archetype list
novel design token introduced: any hex not in design_tokens_locked except the single derived --mm-navy-deep
missing function_id binding: any function_map entry without a concrete JS implementation
ambiguity in orchestration_logic: any trigger without a called function
file identity generic: artifact_id, project_bucket, thread_name, artifact_role, or artifact_version missing from top level
success_condition_declared: Claude Manual Builder can read this JSON end-to-end and emit FULL_OPERATOR_MANUAL.html plus MANUAL_AUDIT.json with zero clarification requests, zero novel archetypes, zero forbidden tokens, zero em-dashes, and full RESULT-header-gated execution flow.
